title: Glazed Kenyan Beef Grill
description: A single-serving, wine-infused Kenyan beef grilled to perfection with a creamy glaze, finished with a quick ice-bath shock and served on a raclette grill.
instructions: Pat the beef slices dry and drizzle with olive oil, seasoning with smoked paprika, cumin, cinnamon, garlic, and low-sodium salt.
Place the beef on a preheated raclette grill and sear each side for 2 minutes until browned.
Remove the beef and set aside in an ice water bath for 30 seconds to chill quickly and stop cooking.
In the same grill pan, pour the dry red wine and let it reduce by half over medium heat.
Add the butter and lemon juice to the pan, stirring until the glaze thickens and turns silky.
Return the chilled beef to the grill pan and coat thoroughly with the creamy glaze, cooking for an additional 1 minute.
Transfer the glazed beef to a plate and drizzle extra glaze over it.
Sprinkle chopped parsley on top and serve immediately.
